description: citizen believes that everyone deserves a watch that is truly individual and exceptional in character. Combining the newest technology with classic, sophisticated designs, this range of watches has something for everyone. If you're looking for a reliable timepiece which has an elegant, stylish look then your search is over!Case diameter: 37 mmCase thickness: 6 mmDial shape: RoundWarranty: One year international warrantyGold coloured stainless steel round caseGold coloured steel strap with a butterfly claspWhite dial with golden handsBranding on the dialDate aperture on the dialScrew to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant
